# Popover

Displays interactive floating content from a trigger.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/popover
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="popover"
  example={0}
  code={`<Popover.Root><Popover.Trigger>Open</Popover.Trigger><Popover.Content>Interactive content</Popover.Content></Popover.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Popover.Root>
  <Popover.Trigger>Open</Popover.Trigger>
  <Popover.Content>Interactive content</Popover.Content>
</Popover.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="popover"
  example={1}
  code={`<Popover.Content aria-label="Project settings"><Popover.Close>Close</Popover.Close></Popover.Content>`}
/>

```tsx
<Popover.Content aria-label="Project settings">
  <Popover.Close>Close</Popover.Close>
</Popover.Content>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="popover"
  example={2}
  code={`<Popover.Content side="bottom">Positioned below the trigger</Popover.Content>`}
/>

```tsx
<Popover.Content side="bottom">Positioned below the trigger</Popover.Content>
```

No component-specific props are documented yet. Primitive props pass through to the underlying element or Radix part.
